sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Turn-based tactics RPG with grid-based movement.

special_mechanics.name: Encumbrance Movement Penalty
special_mechanics.description: Encumbered characters move at 3/4 their maximum rate, with fractional speeds supported by engine.

special_mechanics.name: Turn-Based Movement System
special_mechanics.description: Grid-based turn-based tactical movement. Characters take turns based on initiative order. Movement governed by D&D 3.5 rules with simplified mechanics.

tier_notes: Tier 3 game (empirical/qualitative data only). The Temple of Elemental Evil is a turn-based tactical RPG, not a real-time action game. No traditional physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) apply. Movement is governed by D&D 3.5 tabletop rules implemented in a grid-based system. Documentation focuses on game mechanics and rule implementation rather than physics simulation.
